category_sources: Official repository README describes Monocle as a tool for Border Gateway Protocol data.
source_facts.description says Monocle is for seeing through BGP data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monocle; official repository README title is Monocle.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists installation, documentation files, architecture, and command usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined as instructed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions BGP data; official README documents BGP parsing/search/inspection commands and Rust project context.
